Welcome to the New Chapeaux Project Site

{ "$__toml_private_datetime" = "2026-03-30" }

We're excited to launch the new Chapeaux Project website. This site serves as the central hub for everything related to Chapeaux — a digital supply chain for web assets.

What's Here

The new site brings together all aspects of the project in one place:

  • Contribute — Everything you need to begin working with Chapeaux tools
  • Projects — A catalog of all repositories in the Chapeaux ecosystem, organized by our three stages
  • Chapellerie — Our playground for demos, experiments, and testing
  • About — The philosophy and design principles behind the project

The Three Stages

Chapeaux is organized around three concerns — what we call the "3 Ds":

  1. Develop — Creating enterprise-grade web development tools (Active)
  2. Discover — Building a central catalog for web assets (In Progress)
  3. Deliver — Standardizing web asset delivery (Coming Soon)

Each stage is at a different level of maturity, and the Projects page shows the current status of every repository.

Get Involved

Chapeaux is open source and we welcome contributors. Check out the Contribute guide or browse the projects catalog to find something that interests you.
